productList.name: KNUT
productList.description: Double-breasted, oversized coat in pure silk organza with lapels and welt pockets. This item features camel-fibre padding covered in pure silk crêpe de Chine fabric. Lined. Button fastening.

productList.name: KIRIE
productList.description: Double-breasted, masculine-style coat in pure silk organza with lapels and flap pockets. This item features camel-fibre padding covered in pure silk crêpe de Chine fabric. Lined. Button fastening.

productList.name: PAROLA
productList.description: Pure silk organza wraparound coat with hood and patch pockets. This item features camel-fibre padding covered in pure silk crêpe de Chine fabric. Lined. Fastening with matching belt.

productList.name: SAFARI
productList.description: Pea coat in cashmere and wool with double lined collar. The garment has long kimono sleeves, welt pockets and double-breasted fastening with snap buttons.

productList.name: LADINO
productList.description: Coat in cashmere and wool with trompe l'oeil double effect collar and lined with beaver fur. The garment has long kimono sleeves, inset pockets on the seams and fastening with matching belt.

productList.name: ALI
productList.description: Long redingote coat in cashmere and wool with inner lining. The wide lapel collar is covered in mink fur. Welt side pockets and fastening with matching belt.

productList.name: MARTA
productList.description: Redingote coat in alpaca and wool with wide lapel, maxi patch pockets and mohair trimmed edges in contrasting colour. The garment comes with a thin belt for tying and a wide belt with buttons.

productList.name: LUCIA
productList.description: Menswear-inspired coat in pure cashmere with lapel collar, welt pockets, long low set-in sleeves and leather detail. Fastens with a thin leather belt.

productList.name: FELTRO
productList.description: Long flared coat with high neck, welt pockets and wide slits on the sides. Fastens with a matching belt. Finished with saddle seam stitching.

productList.name: AGAVE
productList.description: Oversized coat in pure camel with large shawl collar to wear as a hood or foulard. The garment has long kimono sleeves, patch pockets and wide slits on the sides. Unlined.

productList.name: GASTONE
productList.description: Double-breasted pure camel hair coat with beaver fur, step lapel and large welt pockets on the sides. Slightly egg shape with kimono sleeves. Button fastening.
productList.summary: Camel hair coat with beaver fur

productList.name: GASTONE
productList.description: Double-breasted pure camel hair coat with beaver fur, step lapel and large welt pockets on the sides. Slightly egg shape with kimono sleeves. Button fastening.
productList.summary: Camel hair coat with beaver fur

productList.name: FAUST
productList.description: Hand-sewn double-breasted coat in two layers of pure cashmere with step lapels, patch pockets and half belt. Kimono sleeves on the front with raglan construction at the back. Button fastening.

productList.name: TUNDRA
productList.description: Hand-sewn long coat in two layers of wool and cashmere with round neck, kimono sleeves and inset side pockets. Fastens with buttons and matching belt.

productList.name: FURETTO
productList.description: Long wrap coat made of heavyweight camel melange with step lapels, breast pocket and inset side pockets with flaps. Straight-fit with slit in the middle of the back. Silk lining. Concealed button fastening.

productList.name: NELLA
productList.description: Hand-sewn wrap coat in two layers of pure wool and cashmere with step lapels and patch pockets. Straight fit with kimono sleeves. Fastens with matching belt.
